case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. ISAIAH JONES

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-24-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, ISAIAH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-20-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-24-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
